title: Calendar Event Change Approved Payload
description: Schema for the payload of calendar.event_change_approved events

eventId.description: Unique identifier for the calendar event

changeRequestId.description: Unique identifier for the change request being approved

changeType.description: Type of change that was approved

originalStartTime.description: Original event start time before the change

newStartTime.description: New event start time after the change

originalEndTime.description: Original event end time before the change

newEndTime.description: New event end time after the change

responseTimeMs.description: Time taken to approve the change in milliseconds

conflictsResolved.description: Number of calendar conflicts resolved by this change

attendeeCountAffected.description: Number of attendees affected by the change

calendarId.description: Identifier for the calendar containing this event
